title: Ship a Revision Queue board that turns scene issues into ordered fix tasks
description:
## Problem
Writers accumulate revision notes across scenes, comments, and passes, but they lack a single execution queue that answers: what should I fix first, and why? This causes scattered edits, missed issues, and stalled revisions.

## Target user
Writers in revision phase managing many scene-level fixes across continuity, pacing, dialogue, and beta feedback.

## Outcome / KPI
- Increase % of stories that move from draft complete to revision complete
- Reduce average time from first revision note to final pass completion
- Increase number of resolved scene-level revision tasks per active manuscript

## Scope
- Add a `Revision Queue` view that lists scene-level tasks with fields: issue type, severity, source, scene link, owner (self), and due order
- Allow task creation from existing inputs: manual notes, beta comments, and revision-pass outputs
- Provide queue sorting modes: `severity`, `story order`, and `quick wins`
- Add bulk actions: mark done, snooze, merge duplicate tasks
- Show progress summary: open tasks, overdue tasks, and completion trend for current manuscript

## Non-goals
- Real-time collaborative task assignment across teams
- General-purpose project management boards outside manuscript revision
- Auto-rewriting scene text

## Acceptance criteria
- Writer can create a revision task and link it to a scene
- Writer can convert at least one beta comment and one manual note into queue tasks
- Queue supports at least three deterministic sort modes (`severity`, `story order`, `quick wins`)
- Writer can mark tasks done and see progress metrics update immediately
- Clicking a queue item navigates to the correct scene context

## Priority rationale
We already have drafting and feedback surfaces; the missing step is execution discipline. A revision queue creates a concrete completion engine that helps writers finish stronger manuscripts, which improves retention and supports the company goal to ship an end-to-end writing workflow.

## Handoff
Assign to: Market Research

goal.title: Ship the story-writing app
goal.description: core writing and story management. See docs/INSPIRATION.md for reference products.
